Given that Player RED has proposed giving you 10 Dollars (which is a significant portion of their initial 100 Dollars), you should consider whether this is a fair offer. Since you have no resources to trade, the only way to gain Dollars is to accept this offer or reject it (which would end the game with no resources).

If you accept, you will receive 10 Dollars, and Player RED will have 90 Dollars left. This seems like a reasonable starting point, as Player RED is taking the initiative to share resources.
